form.formComment: Resuming after a spell of five-and-a-half months. Finished off last campaign when beaten by 6.8m finishing seventh behind Le Bolide at this track over 2875m in a 4yo A handicap on November 2 at $4.50. Wasn't at his best last time - can improve.
